languages.text:
Using specific equipment aboard their voidship Rogue Trader can replace body parts of themselves and willing companions with mechanical tools and implements.
Once installed, bionics can never be truly removed, as the body part is forever lost. There are, however, a ready supply of "backup" bionics to be installed in case of removal.
Generally, bionics come with both positive and negative effects, and some bionics come with galvanization capability.

traits.locale_text:
Using specific equipment aboard their voidship Rogue Trader can replace body parts of themselves and willing companions with mechanical tools and implements.
Once installed, bionics can never be truly removed, as the body part is forever lost. There are, however, a ready supply of "backup" bionics to be installed in case of removal.
Generally, bionics come with both positive and negative effects, and some bionics come with galvanization capability.

languages.text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.
languages.original_text:
Using specific equipment aboard their voidship Rogue Trader can replace body parts of themselves and willing companions with mechanical tools and implements.
Once installed, bionics can never be truly removed, as the body part is forever lost. There are, however, a ready supply of "backup" bionics to be installed in case of removal.
Generally, bionics come with both positive and negative effects, and some bionics come with galvanization capability.

traits.locale_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments provide both positive and negative effects, and some augments have galvanisation abilities.
Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers trauma, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.

Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects, and some have galvanisation abilities.
Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set for galvanisation at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers a trauma, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and galvanisation ability.

languages.text:
Используя специализированные помещения на борту своего пустотного корабля, Вольный Торговец и желающие того компаньоны могут заменять части собственного тела на аугменты.
После установки аугмент нельзя снять, поскольку замененная часть тела оказывается безвозвратно утрачена. Однако при необходимости их можно заменить стандартными аугментами.
У аугментов есть как позитивные, так и негативные свойства.
languages.original_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
Используя специализированные помещения на борту своего пустотного корабля, Вольный Торговец может заменить части собственного тела, а также тела согласных компаньонов, на аугменты.
После установки аугменты нельзя снять, так как оригинальная часть тела безвозвратно утрачена. Однако их можно заменить стандартными аугментами при необходимости.
Аугменты имеют как позитивные, так и негативные эффекты.

Используя специализированные помещения на борту своего пустотного корабля, Вольный Торговец и желающие того компаньоны могут заменять части собственного тела на аугменты.
После установки аугмент нельзя снять, поскольку замененная часть тела оказывается безвозвратно утрачена. Однако при необходимости их можно заменить стандартными аугментами.
У аугментов есть как позитивные, так и негативные свойства.

Используя специализированные помещения на борту своего пустотного корабля, Вольный Торговец и желающие того компаньоны могут заменять части собственного тела на аугменты.
После установки аугмент нельзя снять, поскольку замененная часть тела оказывается безвозвратно утрачена. Однако при необходимости их можно заменить стандартными аугментами.
У аугментов есть как позитивные, так и негативные свойства.

languages.text:
Mit spezialisierten Einrichtungen auf ihrem Raumschiff können Freihändler ihre eigenen und die Körperteile williger Gefährten durch Augmentationen ersetzen.
Nach der Installation können Augmentationen nicht mehr abgelegt werden, da die ursprünglichen Körperteile entfernt wurden. Sie können bei Bedarf allerdings durch Standardaugmentationen ersetzt werden.
Augmentationen haben positive und negative Effekte.
languages.original_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
Mit spezialisierten Einrichtungen auf ihrem Raumschiff können Freihändler ihre eigenen und die Körperteile williger Gefährten durch Augmentationen ersetzen.
Nach der Installation können Augmentationen nicht mehr abgelegt werden, da die ursprünglichen Körperteile entfernt wurden. Sie können bei Bedarf allerdings durch Standardaugmentationen ersetzt werden.
Augmentationen haben positive und negative Effekte. Einige haben darüber hinaus Galvanisierungsfähigkeiten.
Durch den Einsatz der Galvanisierung-Fähigkeit kann eine Augmentation ihre eigenen Grenzen überschreiten, was den Nutzer allerdings extrem belastet.
Es kann immer nur eine Augmentation galvanisiert werden.
Erleidet ein Körperteil mit einer installierten Augmentation ein Trauma, funktioniert die Augmentation nicht und verliert neben ihren positiven Effekten auch die Galvanisierung-Fähigkeit.

languages.text:
En las instalaciones especializadas de su nave del vacío, los Comerciantes Independientes pueden reemplazar partes de su cuerpo y de las de sus compañeros con aumentos.
Una vez están instalados, es imposible desequipar aumentos, ya que la parte biológica original se pierde para siempre. No obstante, se pueden reemplazar por aumentos estándar, de ser necesario.
Los aumentos tienen efectos positivos y negativos.
languages.original_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
En las instalaciones especializadas de su nave del vacío, los Comerciantes Independientes pueden reemplazar partes de su cuerpo y de las de sus compañeros con aumentos.
Una vez están instalados, es imposible desequipar aumentos, ya que la parte biológica original se pierde para siempre. No obstante, se pueden reemplazar por aumentos estándar, de ser necesario.
Los aumentos tienen efectos positivos y negativos, y algunos tienen capacidades de galvanización.
Las capacidades de galvanización permiten a los aumentos operar más allá de sus límites habituales, pero esto acarrea consecuencias para el usuario.
No se puede preparar más de una galvanización al mismo tiempo.
Si una parte del cuerpo con un aumento instalado sufre una aflicción, el aumento se avería, por lo que pierde su efecto positivo y su capacidad de galvanización.

languages.text:
行商浪人可以在他们的虚空舰上使用专业设施，将自己或那些自愿接受改造的同伴的身体部位替换为植入物。
一旦安装，植入物无法卸下，因为原始身体部位已永久丧失。但如有必要，可用标准植入物替换。
植入物拥有其正面效果以及负面效果。
languages.original_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
行商浪人可以在他们的虚空舰上使用专业设施，将自己或那些自愿接受改造的同伴的身体部位替换为植入物。
一旦安装，植入物无法卸下，因为原始身体部位已永久丧失。但如有必要，可用标准植入物替换。
植入物拥有其正面效果以及负面效果，部分还具有电激能力。
使用电激能力可使植入物超常运作，但使用者将承受沉重的负荷。
一次只能配置一个植入物进行电激。
若装有植入物的身体部位遭受创伤，该植入物将失效，失去其正面效果和电激能力。

languages.text:
Bir Hür Tacir, uçsuz gemisindeki özel tesisleri kullanarak hem kendisinin hem de rıza gösteren yoldaşlarının vücut parçalarını ogmentlerle değiştirebilir.
Bir kez takılan bir ogment, orijinal vücut parçası temelli yitirildiği için bir daha çıkarılamaz. Ancak gerektiğinde standart bir ogment ile değiştirilebilir.
Ogmentlerin hem olumlu hem de olumsuz etkileri bulunur.
languages.original_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
Bir Hür Tacir, uçsuz gemisindeki özel tesisleri kullanarak hem kendisinin hem de rıza gösteren yoldaşlarının vücut parçalarını ogmentlerle değiştirebilir.
Bir kez takılan bir ogment, orijinal vücut parçası temelli yitirildiği için bir daha çıkarılamaz. Ancak gerektiğinde standart bir ogment ile değiştirilebilir.
Ogmentlerin hem olumlu hem de olumsuz etkileri bulunur. Bazıları da bunlara ek olarak galvanizleme kabiliyetlerine sahiptirler.
Galvanizleme kabiliyeti kullanmak, ogmentin normal sınırlarının ötesinde çalışmasını sağlasa da kullanıcı üzerinde ciddi bir yük oluşturur.
Aynı anda yalnızca bir ogment galvanizlemeye ayarlanabilir.
Ogment takılmış bir vücut parçası, bir travmaya maruz kaldığında o ogment de arızalanarak olumlu etkilerini ve galvanizleme kabiliyetini kaybeder.

languages.text:
En profitant des installations spécialisées de son vaisseau spatial, un libre-marchand peut remplacer certaines parties de son organisme par des augmentations et faire subir le même sort à des compagnons volontaires.
Une fois installée, une augmentation ne peut pas être simplement retirée, puisque la chair d'origine a été détruite. En revanche, elle peut être remplacée par d'autres augmentations de modèle standard si nécessaire.
Ces mécanismes ont tout à la fois des effets positifs et négatifs.
languages.original_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
En profitant des installations spécialisées de son vaisseau spatial, un libre-marchand peut remplacer certaines parties de son organisme par des augmentations et faire subir le même sort à des compagnons volontaires.
Une fois installée, une augmentation ne peut pas être simplement retirée, puisque la chair d'origine a été détruite. En revanche, elle peut être remplacée par d'autres augmentations de modèle standard si nécessaire.
Ces mécanismes ont tout à la fois des effets positifs et négatifs, et sont susceptibles d'être galvanisés.
L'utilisation d'une capacité de galvanisation permet à une augmentation d'opérer au-delà de ses limites normales, cela au coût d'un stress important de l'organisme de l'utilisateur.
Une seule augmentation peut être galvanisée à la fois.
Une augmentation devient défaillante lorsque la partie du corps où elle est installée subit un traumatisme. Ses effets positifs et sa capacité de galvanisation sont alors neutralisés.

languages.text:
ローグトレーダーは、自分の体の一部や、自発的に同意した仲間の体の一部を、特殊な施設を使って、増幅器に置き換えることができる。
増幅器は一度装着されると、取り外すことはできない。元の体の一部は永久に失われるからだ。しかし、必要に応じて標準的な増幅器に置き換えることはできる。
増幅器は、プラスの効果とマイナス効果の両方を持つ。
languages.original_text:
Using specialised facilities aboard their voidship, a Rogue Trader can replace their own body parts, as well as those of willing companions, with augments.
Once installed, augments cannot be unequipped, as the original body part is permanently lost. However, they can be replaced with standard augments if necessary.
Augments have both positive and negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
ローグトレーダーは、自分の体の一部や、自発的に同意した仲間の体の一部を、特殊な施設を使って、増幅器に置き換えることができる。
増幅器は一度装着されると、取り外すことはできない。元の体の一部は永久に失われるからだ。しかし、必要に応じて標準的な増幅器に置き換えることはできる。
増幅器は、プラスの効果とマイナス効果の両方を持つ。
